      have h₄ : (q.Z[i]!).val ^ 2 + (q.Z[i]!).val ^ 2 ≤ 2 ^ 63 := by
        have h₅ : (q.Z[i]!).val < 2 ^ 52 + 1 := by
          have h₆ : (q.Z[i]!).val ≤ 2 ^ 52 := h₃

          positivity

          nlinarith [pow_pos (by norm_num : (0 : ℕ) < 2) 52]
        have h₉ : (q.Z[i]!).val ^ 2 + (q.Z[i]!).val ^ 2 ≤ 2 ^ 63 := by
